title: SQLancer calc.abs undefined
poc: SELECT ALL CAST(VAR_SAMP(ALL abs(CAST(t0.c1 AS INT))) AS INT) FROM t0 GROUP BY CAST(t0.c1 AS INT), t0.c1;
key_bug_features: Using abs() on a VARCHAR column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."t1" ("id" INT PRIMARY KEY, "value" VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
SELECT ALL CAST(VAR_SAMP(ALL abs(CAST(t1.value AS INT))) AS INT) FROM "sys"."t1" GROUP BY CAST(t1.value AS INT), t1.value;
